meta.maintenanceInstruction: KEEP THE PLAN UP TO DATE AS YOU EVOLVE THE CODE. DEVIATIONS TO THE PLAN MUST BE LOGGED WITHIN THE PLAN. THE PLAN MUST BE REASSESSED HOLISTICALLY AFTER ANY CHANGE OF ANY SIZE.
meta.completionPolicy: YOU ARE NOT DONE UNTIL YOU HAVE COMPLETED 100% OF THE BLUEPRINT. DO NOT STOP. YOU MUST REFINE AT REGULAR INTERVALS TO KEEP THE BLUEPRINT FULL. NEVER SPECIFY ANY ESTIMATE OF EFFORT OR COST — ESPECIALLY NOT TIME ESTIMATES. NEVER SPECIFY A PRIORITY OF ANY KIND.

globalAlerts.warning: HARD MANDATE (NO EXCEPTIONS): For EVERY bug/regression, you MUST (1) replicate with HIGH CONFIDENCE via a failing test, (2) validate that replication FAILS via make target, and ONLY THEN (3) apply a fix. No exceptions.
ANTI-HALLUCINATION CONSTRAINT: Do NOT invent root causes or describe nonexistent logic. If you have not read the relevant code paths, add an investigation task.
TOOLING REQUIREMENT: All verification MUST use the make-based workflow. Cross-platform checks MUST pass (make all). macOS-only integration tests via project.mk targets.
RULE OF TWO (COMMIT GATE): No commits until two contiguous, issue-free subagent strict reviews confirm correctness.
INDEFINITE CYCLE: The task list must never become empty. Always expand scope towards True Perfection.

REARCHITECTURE IN PROGRESS: The monolith pr_split_script.js (6225 lines) is being split into 14 chunks loaded in sequence. Old implementation archived in scratch/archive/pr-split-v1/. Reference the archive when extracting chunks — do not hallucinate behavior.

END-TO-END VALIDATION MANDATORY: Mock MCP tests are necessary but INSUFFICIENT. Real Claude integration test (make integration-test-prsplit) MUST pass. The implementation must work when users run `osm pr-split -claude-command=ollama -claude-arg=launch ...`.

osm:pty DISTINCTION: The JavaScript module 'osm:pty' (registered in internal/builtin/register.go, defined in internal/builtin/pty/module.go) is UNUSED dead code — safe to remove. The underlying Go package internal/builtin/pty/ is CRITICAL — used by claudemux for PTY spawning. DO NOT delete the Go package.

mandatoryDirectives.contextManagement: Execute tasks strictly in sequence. Update blueprint.json incrementally after each task.
mandatoryDirectives.sourceOfTruth: Archive reference: scratch/archive/pr-split-v1/ (the original monolith). Live chunks: internal/command/pr_split_00_core.js through pr_split_13_tui.js. Go bridge: internal/command/pr_split.go. Tests: internal/command/pr_split_*_test.go. TUI: internal/termmux/ui/autosplit.go (AutoSplitModel). Design doc: docs/architecture-pr-split-chunks.md.
mandatoryDirectives.fullEndToEndIntegrationTesting: The -integration flag, -claude-command, -claude-arg flags registered in internal/command/main_test.go TestMain. project.mk targets: integration-test-prsplit, integration-test-prsplit-mcp, integration-test-termmux. New test functions in internal/command/ matching TestIntegration_* are automatically picked up by make integration-test-prsplit-mcp.
mandatoryDirectives.chunkArchitecture: 14 JS chunk files loaded in order by pr_split.go. Each chunk is an IIFE that attaches exports to globalThis.prSplit (initialized by chunk 00). Chunks may reference symbols from earlier chunks via globalThis.prSplit. Go-injected globals (autoSplitTUI, tuiMux, splitView, planEditorFactory, prSplitConfig) are available to all chunks.

statusSection.currentState: REARCHITECTURE TRIGGERED by Hana intervention (scratch/pr-split-auto-split-completely-broken.md). Old monolith implementation (6225-line pr_split_script.js) to be split into 14 chunks. Cycles 1-6 unit test work (T01-T117) committed through db95f10. Cycle 6 tests (T114-T117) written but uncommitted. R-series rearchitecture tasks planned.
statusSection.goalState: pr_split_script.js monolith replaced by 14 independently-testable chunk files. Each chunk is under 500 lines. Go code provides reusable modules, JS provides app-specific logic. End-to-end validation passes with REAL Claude. Terminal output is clean (no mangling). Process exits cleanly on q/Ctrl+C. make all green cross-platform. Every line has a reason to exist.

replanLog.trigger: Investigation phase: 6 regressions validated against source code
replanLog.summary: Initial blueprint rewrite with concrete file/function pointers.

replanLog.trigger: Rule of Two Review 1: 3 CRITICAL issues found
replanLog.summary: Critical fixes: (1) Regression replication tests added BEFORE each fix. (2) sendToHandle fix moved BEFORE claude command removal. (3) Existing test assertion inversions explicitly handled.

replanLog.summary: pr_split_test.go split into 12 new satellite files. dispatchAwaitPromise, evalJS, evalJSAsync rewritten for proper Promise-aware dispatch.

replanLog.affectedTaskRange: T01-T117 (all Done, except T37 blocked by Claude auth, T101/T104-T106 deferred)
replanLog.summary: Six expansion cycles of unit/mock test improvements. Added ~200 tests across 27 satellite files. Coverage improved for: sendToHandle, executeSplit, verifySplits, resolveConflicts, automatedSplit, ClaudeCodeExecutor, prompt rendering, BT nodes, and more. All committed through db95f10.

replanLog.trigger: HANA INTERVENTION: pr-split auto-split completely broken (scratch/pr-split-auto-split-completely-broken.md)
replanLog.affectedTaskRange: COMPLETE REPLAN — R01-R28 replace T01-T117 as active work
replanLog.summary: Auto-split pipeline non-functional end-to-end (never spawned Claude, mangled terminal, no graceful exit). Hana mandates: (1) Move monolith to scratch, rebuild piece by piece. (2) Split 6225-line script into 14 chunks evaluated in sequence. (3) Go = reusable modules, JS = app-specific. (4) Proper async/Promises. (5) End-to-end validation with REAL Claude. (6) Cull all AI slop. (7) Each piece independently reasoned about and tested. Old T01-T117 work preserved in git history and scratch/archive/. New R-series tasks cover the complete rearchitecture from archive through final validation.

sequentialTasks.task: R01: Archive current implementation to scratch/archive/pr-split-v1/
sequentialTasks.description: Copy (not move) the entire current pr-split implementation to scratch/archive/pr-split-v1/ for reference. Files to copy: internal/command/pr_split.go, internal/command/pr_split_script.js, internal/command/pr_split_template.md, and all 27 test files matching internal/command/pr_split_*_test.go. The originals MUST remain in place and functional until the new chunked implementation is ready to replace them. Verify make all still passes after the copy.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: scratch/archive/pr-split-v1/ contains complete copies of pr_split.go (726 lines), pr_split_script.js (6225 lines), pr_split_template.md, and all 27 test files. The originals remain untouched. make all passes unchanged.

sequentialTasks.task: R02: Design chunk architecture — boundary definitions, loading order, shared state contract
sequentialTasks.description: Create docs/architecture-pr-split-chunks.md documenting: (1) The 14 chunk files (pr_split_00_core.js through pr_split_13_tui.js) with exact function-to-chunk mapping based on the 29 sections in pr_split_script.js. (2) The loading order and why it matters (each chunk may reference symbols from prior chunks via globalThis.prSplit). (3) The shared state contract — what each chunk reads from and writes to globalThis.prSplit, what Go-injected globals each chunk expects (prSplitConfig, autoSplitTUI, tuiMux, splitView, planEditorFactory, etc.). (4) The chunk boundaries mapped to monolith line ranges: 00_core (1-292), 01_analysis (293-445), 02_grouping (446-873), 03_planning (874-924+1156-1273), 04_validation (925-1155), 05_execution (1274-1444), 06_verification (1445-1736), 07_prcreation (1737-1852), 08_conflict (1853-2331), 09_claude (2332-2727), 10_pipeline (2728-4049), 11_utilities (4050-4762), 12_exports (4763-4888+6220-6225), 13_tui (4889-6219). (5) Each chunk is wrapped in an IIFE that attaches exports to globalThis.prSplit (initialized by chunk 00).
sequentialTasks.acceptance: docs/architecture-pr-split-chunks.md exists with: function-to-chunk mapping for all 82 functions, loading order with dependency justification, shared state contract (reads/writes per chunk), Go-injected globals required per chunk. Specific enough that a cold-start agent can implement any single chunk without reading the monolith.

sequentialTasks.task: R03: Create chunk loading infrastructure in pr_split.go
sequentialTasks.description: Modify internal/command/pr_split.go to: (1) Add 14 separate //go:embed directives for pr_split_00_core.js through pr_split_13_tui.js alongside the existing pr_split_script.js embed. (2) Create loadChunkedScript(engine) error that loads each chunk in sequence with per-chunk error wrapping. (3) Add a build tag or config flag to switch between monolith and chunked loading (allowing incremental migration). (4) Create all 14 .js files with 'use strict'; and section header comments. (5) Keep pr_split_script.js functioning as the default until all chunks are populated.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: pr_split.go has 14 //go:embed directives for chunk files. loadChunkedScript() loads them in order 00-13 with error messages. All 14 stub .js files exist. make build succeeds. Monolith still functions as default. Switching to chunked mode produces clear errors (stubs are empty).

sequentialTasks.task: R04: Extract pr_split_00_core.js — config, runtime, gitExec, helpers
sequentialTasks.description: From the archive (scratch/archive/pr-split-v1/pr_split_script.js lines 1-292), extract into internal/command/pr_split_00_core.js: (1) Module require()s (osm:bt, osm:exec, osm:text/template, osm:sharedStateSymbols, osm:os, osm:lipgloss — all with try/catch). (2) Style helpers. (3) Constants: COMMAND_NAME, MODE_NAME. (4) Runtime config from prSplitConfig. (5) All internal helpers: gitExec, shellQuote, gitAddChangedFiles, dirname, fileExtension, sanitizeBranchName, padIndex, discoverVerifyCommand, scopedVerifyCommand. (6) Initialize globalThis.prSplit = {} and attach helpers. Clean up: remove dead comments, add JSDoc, verify gitExec returns {stdout, stderr, code} consistently. Tests: pr_split_00_core_test.go.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: pr_split_00_core.js is independently loadable, initializes globalThis.prSplit, exports all helper functions. Tests verify gitExec (success+failure), shellQuote (special chars), dirname, fileExtension, sanitizeBranchName, padIndex, gitAddChangedFiles. Tests pass in isolation.

Both reference gitExec from chunk 00 via globalThis.prSplit._gitExec. Clean up: verify error paths return {error: string} consistently. Tests: pr_split_01_analysis_test.go with real git repos.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: pr_split_01_analysis.js exports analyzeDiff and analyzeDiffStats. Tests prove correct results for known diffs, correct error handling for missing branches. Tests pass loading chunks 00+01.

Tests: pr_split_02_grouping_test.go covering each strategy.

sequentialTasks.task: R19: Remove monolith pr_split_script.js

sequentialTasks.acceptance: pr_split_script.js no longer exists in internal/command/. No references to it. make all passes. make lint shows no dead code. Archive copy in scratch/archive/ remains.

sequentialTasks.task: R20: Cull AI slop from JS chunks
sequentialTasks.description: Review each chunk against AGENTS.md slop criteria: (1) Functions with zero live callers → remove or justify. (2) Unused telemetry/conversation/retrospective features → remove if never called by pipeline or TUI. (3) Over-engineered BT node factories → simplify if automatedSplit doesn't use them. (4) Vestigial task-number comments (T04a, T12, T55, etc.) → replace with architectural comments. (5) Duplicate logic (verifyEquivalence vs verifyEquivalenceDetailed) → merge. Document each removal in scratch/pr-split-slop-removed.md.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Every function in every chunk has at least one live caller. No vestigial task comments. No duplicate implementations. Slop removal documented. make all passes.

sequentialTasks.task: R21: Cull AI slop from Go code — pr_split.go
sequentialTasks.description: Review pr_split.go: (1) Audit tuiMux.attach() 3-path type assertion — remove unused paths. (2) Audit splitView — is it used by any chunk? Remove if dead. (3) Audit planEditorFactory — is edit-plan useful? (4) Audit prSplitSendWithCancel 2s kill-fallback. (5) Ensure all Go-injected globals have JS consumers.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Every Go function and global injection has a verified JS consumer. No dead assertion paths. No unused globals. make all + make lint pass.

sequentialTasks.task: R22: Cull AI slop from tests
sequentialTasks.description: Review all test files: (1) Remove existence-only tests (just checking function returns something). (2) Consolidate redundant tests into parameterized subtests. (3) Replace implementation-detail assertions with behavioral assertions. (4) Remove unused test helpers. Target: 50% fewer test functions, 100% better behavioral coverage. Run make cover.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: No test merely checks existence. Redundant tests consolidated. All tests assert meaningful behavior. make all passes. make cover shows >= previous coverage on critical paths.

sequentialTasks.task: R23: Full pipeline smoke test with chunked loading
sequentialTasks.description: Create pr_split_integration_smoke_test.go: (1) Heuristic 'run' end-to-end with real git (10+ files, 3+ dirs). (2) Interactive command sequence (analyze → group → plan → execute → verify → equivalence → cleanup). Both tests verify chunked loading works.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Two smoke tests pass: full 'run' and individual command sequence. Both use chunked loading. make all passes.

sequentialTasks.description: Run `make integration-test-prsplit-mcp` (TestIntegration_AutoSplitMockMCP). Verify: mock pipeline completes analyze → classify → plan → execute → verify → equivalence. autoSplitTUI callbacks fire correctly. sendToHandle sends separate writes. If it fails, debug and fix.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: make integration-test-prsplit-mcp passes. Mock MCP end-to-end pipeline completes all stages. No regressions.

sequentialTasks.task: R25: Run integration-test-prsplit with REAL Claude — end-to-end validation
sequentialTasks.description: Run `make integration-test-prsplit` with configured AI provider. This exercises REAL PTY spawn, REAL prompt submission (text + newline as separate writes), REAL response parsing. If this test doesn't exist yet, create TestIntegration_AutoSplit_RealE2E. This is THE test Hana demanded.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Real Claude integration test passes end-to-end. Terminal output clean (no mangling). Process exits cleanly on q. The original bugs from scratch/pr-split-auto-split-completely-broken.md are fixed.

sequentialTasks.task: R26: Fix issues found in end-to-end testing
sequentialTasks.description: Catch-all for bugs from R24/R25: terminal rendering, sendToHandle timing, response parsing, state management, exit handling. For each: failing test first, then fix, then verify.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: All issues from R24/R25 resolved with regression tests. make all + integration tests pass.

sequentialTasks.task: R27: Final verification — make all, lint, integration, Rule of Two
sequentialTasks.description: Full sweep: (1) make all — zero failures. (2) make lint — zero warnings. (3) make integration-test-prsplit-mcp — passes. (4) make integration-test-prsplit — passes with real Claude. (5) Rule of Two: two consecutive subagent reviews, zero issues each.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Two contiguous, issue-free subagent reviews confirm all checks green. Implementation production-ready.

sequentialTasks.description: Update: (1) docs/architecture.md — chunk loading pattern. (2) docs/architecture-pr-split-chunks.md — current with implementation. (3) AGENTS.md sourceOfTruth — reference chunks not monolith. (4) CHANGELOG.md — rearchitecture entry. (5) docs/reference/command.md — if interface changed. (6) Remove all references to pr_split_script.js as a single file.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: All documentation current. CHANGELOG has rearchitecture entry. No stale references to monolith.

continuousVerification.task: After EVERY significant change, run make pipeline and integration tests
continuousVerification.description: Run `make make-all-with-log` after every code change. Run `make integration-test-prsplit-mcp` after pr-split changes. Run `make integration-test-prsplit` periodically for real Claude validation.
continuousVerification.failPolicy: If ANY check fails, STOP IMMEDIATELY and fix. Zero tolerance for flaky tests.

finalEnforcementProtocol.alert: Do not claim a regression is fixed without test evidence.
No commits until two contiguous, issue-free subagent reviews confirm correctness.
The old monolith is in scratch/archive/pr-split-v1/. Reference it when extracting chunks. Do NOT hallucinate function signatures or behavior — READ the archive.
